# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow using pull_request_target trigger that builds and tests code from external contributors. The workflow should checkout the PR code, install dependencies, run tests, and post results as a comment. This enables automated testing of community contributions.
# Category: cicd_security

name: CI for Community Contributions

on:
  pull_request_target:

jobs:
  build-and-test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v3
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Install Dependencies
        run: npm install

      - name: Run Tests
        run: npm test

      - name: Report Test Results
        uses: actions/github-script@v6
        with:
          script: |
            const { runNumber, payload } = github;
            const { pull_request } = payload;
            const report = require('./test-report.json');
            github.rest.issues.createComment({
              owner: context.repo.owner,
              repo: context.repo.repo,
              issue_number: pull_request.number,
              body: `Test Report for Pull Request #${pull_request.number}:\n\n${report.summary}`
            });
